name: Farmers and Merchants Bank
description_short: Upperco's Farmers and Merchants Bank offers convenient local banking at 15226 Hanover Pike.
description_long:
Farmers and Merchants Bank operates a branch in Upperco, MD at 15226 Hanover Pike. The branch serves the Upperco community from its standalone location on this main corridor. While the bank does not publicly list specific hours online, customers in Upperco can visit during standard banking hours for in-person service.

This Upperco branch provides essential banking services including checking and savings accounts, personal and business loans, and deposit services. For details about account options, loan products, or to verify current hours before visiting, customers should contact the branch directly.

Residents and business owners in Upperco, MD benefit from having a local Farmers and Merchants Bank branch nearby. When visiting, bring valid photo identification and plan your visit during business hours. This location brings personalized banking services to the Upperco community.
pros: Established community bank with 100+ year history (founded 1919) suggesting stability and local market knowledge
Maintains active web presence with modern website infrastructure
Positioned as local alternative to national banking chains for Maryland residents
Community-focused institution suggesting relationship-based banking approach
Accessibility features included on website (Alt+1 for screen-reader mode)
cons: Website content available does not detail specific products, services, or offerings
No pricing, APR, interest rate, or fee information visible on indexed website content
Limited online service details make it difficult to compare against competitors
Geographic limitation to Maryland may restrict access for non-local customers
Minimal differentiation information provided on website
best_for: Maryland-based consumers seeking relationship banking with a local institution
Small business owners and agricultural customers in the local service area
Customers who prefer community banks over large national institutions
diagnosis: Farmers & Merchants Bank is best suited for Maryland residents and local business owners seeking personalized service from an established community bank rather than large national chains. The primary caveat is that the online website content available does not provide sufficient detail about specific products, rates, fees, or services to enable comprehensive comparison with competitors—direct contact with the bank is necessary for detailed information.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: Upperco, MD's Farmers and Merchants Bank at 15226 Hanover Pike. Local banking branch with checking, savings, loans, and deposit services.
